description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a natural wood grain top and a black base, featuring four straight legs. The desk includes a set of two drawers on the left side beneath the tabletop, providing storage space for office supplies or personal items. The wood surface appears smooth and polished, with subtle grain patterns visible across its length. The black base and legs are solid and likely made of painted or coated wood or metal, giving the desk a modern, utilitarian look. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for a variety of work or study environments. The desk's proportions suggest it is intended for single-person use, with ample legroom underneath.
description: A rectangular desk with a wood grain top, black base, and two drawers on the left side. It has a modern, functional design suitable for work or study.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood top, black legs, and two drawers on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the wood top and the solid black panel beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full black panel and the absence of drawers or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wood top and black panel, with no drawers visible.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers is intended to face the user, marking it as the front; the back is a solid black panel with no features.
